name: Ornismon

signature_move.name: Cosmic Ray
signature_move.description: Fires a dazzling laser beam from its mouth.

description: An ancient Digimon that went extinct in the distant past. Boasting a size beyond imagination, it is called the " Ruler of the Skies ". Its personality is ferocious, and it is said that it will frequently assault even larger Digimon. Its Special Move is to fire a dazzling laser beam ( Cosmic Ray ).
